family: NONE (Library-quality metric — explicitly OUTSIDE GEOMETRY-2026-07 BH)
name: Triangle/consolidation tags improve Library precedent-retrieval quality
prior_materials_banner: PRIOR MATERIALS — NON-EVIDENTIARY (A1): research/whole_chart_harvester.py, research/validate_corridor_feature.py (corridor math reused, thresholds NOT), the pre-gate FVG explorations (fvg_express origin note), and any in-sample permutation artifacts (4_permutation_real.png class) inform THESIS TEXT ONLY. Thresholds and effect sizes below are set from mechanism + realistic costs, never reverse-fit to prior results.
thesis: Consolidation geometry (contracting range, time-in-coil) is a regime descriptor; precedents retrieved on matching geometry should produce analogies that HOLD more often than tag-overlap retrieval alone.
measurement: two-proportion comparison over the dark month(+): citations whose matched_tags include geometry tags (consolidation / structure_extreme, emitted via BOARD_EXTREME_TAGS geometry keys) vs structured_v1-only citations; outcome = citation scored TRUE by the A2 citation-scorer harness (append-only citation_scores.jsonl; UNSCOREABLE rows excluded from both arms)
success_criteria: geometry-arm hit-rate minus baseline >= 0.15 AND Fisher exact p < .05
failure_criteria: anything else -> NOT_SIGNIFICANT; either arm < 20 scored citations -> UNDERPOWERED (wait longer)
dependencies: A2 scorer built; review_enabled flip (Colin); adjudicates ~one month out BY DESIGN

validation_protocol.note: NOT in any BH family; single pre-stated test; no reruns on the same citation window

hash_method: sha256 of json.dumps(doc, sort_keys=True, separators=(',',':')) where doc = this object MINUS the hash_lock field
